ksa_text: Knowledge of comprehensive AI evaluation frameworks, including functional performance testing, behavioral testing, red-teaming, fairness evaluation, robustness testing, and safety evaluation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of tools for testing the robustness and resilience of AI products and solutions.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of tools for testing the robustness and resilience of AI products and solutions.
Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-006 (RM, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.5136 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.514, eu_ai_act=0.487, dcwf=0.416) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.5136 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-K-006 (composite 0.5136) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.5136 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.5136 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5136, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
